# Case exports-info-influence: Step 1

## Changed Files
- referencer.js

## Asset Files
- Bundle: bundle.js
- Manifest: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json, size: 28
- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 1298

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main"],"r":[],"m":[]}
```


## Update


### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./referencer.js

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/compat_get_default_export
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {
"./referencer.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)
});
/* import */ var _module__rspack_import_0 = __rspack_require("./module.js");
/* import */ var _module__rspack_import_0_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(_module__rspack_import_0);
/* import */ var external__rspack_import_1 = __rspack_require("external");
/* import */ var external__rspack_import_1_default = /*#__PURE__*/__rspack_require.n(external__rspack_import_1);


/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (`${_module__rspack_import_0.test} ${external__rspack_import_1.test}`);


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
// webpack/runtime/compat_get_default_export
(() => {
// getDefaultExport function for compatibility with non-ESM modules
__rspack_require.n = (module) => {
	var getter = module && module.__esModule ?
		() => (module['default']) :
		() => (module);
	__rspack_require.d(getter, { a: getter });
	return getter;
};

})();
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__rspack_require.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```
